hero.title: Building Steel.
hero.description:
Structural steel erection and fabrication delivered with discipline, integrity, and extreme ownership.

Raising structures, empowering possibilities.

intro.heading: WHO WE ARE
intro.text:
Contreras Steel LLC is a structural steel contractor built on faith, discipline, and execution.

We partner with general contractors, developers, and owners who value accountability, safety, and results.

Our focus is simple: do the work right, lead people well, and build structures that last.

items.title: Structural Steel Erection
items.description: Safe, efficient, and disciplined field execution.

items.title: Steel Fabrication
items.description: Precision-built components that support demanding schedules.

items.title: Turnkey Fabricate & Erect
items.description: One accountable partner from shop floor to final bolt.

testimonials.text: Contreras Steel delivered ahead of schedule with zero safety incidents. Their team is disciplined and professional.
testimonials.author: Construction Manager, Big Build Co.

testimonials.text: The quality of fabrication was outstanding. Everything fit perfectly on site.
testimonials.author: Architect, Design Firm
